title: Get involved | Wetherby and Easingwold
text_excerpt: Get involved | Wetherby and Easingwold Skip to main content Wetherby and Easingwold Conservatives Main navigation About Us News Sir Alec Shelbrooke, M.P. People Get involved Contact Wetherby and Easingwold Conservatives Get involved Tweet Membership Options Being a member of the Conservative Party means that you have joined the most open and democratic political party in Britain. After the first three months of your membership, you will be entitled to a vote in Party ballots. You will also have a chance to influence Party policy by letting us know your views. Any person living in the United Kingdom is eligible to join the Conservative Party. Applicants are not required to be registered voters or UK nationals. There is no upper or lower age limit on membership, although children under the age of 15 cannot be enrolled as full voting members. Standard membership is £39 per year. For Members of the Armed Forces it's £25 per year and for those under 26 it's £10. You can sign up online - www.conservatives.com/join Get involved Join Events Get a postal vote Join or Renew Help us take action on local issues and build a better Britain.
